FeatureClassToFeatureClass "T:\GIS\GeodatabaseAuthorization\GISVector MCGIS.sde\MCGIS.POI_Landmarks_New" "T:\GIS\TIM LEV\2018 LiDAR and General Data Disk\General Data Disk 2018" POI_Landmarks.shp # "NAME "NAME" true true false 255 Text 0 0 ,First,#,T:\GIS\GeodatabaseAuthorization\GISVector MCGIS.sde\MCGIS.POI_Landmarks_New,NAME,-1,-1;ADDRESS "ADDRESS" true true false 255 Text 0 0 ,First,#,T:\GIS\GeodatabaseAuthorization\GISVector MCGIS.sde\MCGIS.POI_Landmarks_New,ADDRESS,-1,-1;TYPE "TYPE" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,T:\GIS\GeodatabaseAuthorization\GISVector MCGIS.sde\MCGIS.POI_Landmarks_New,TYPE,-1,-1;NRNUM "NRNUM" true true false 9 Text 0 0 ,First,#,T:\GIS\GeodatabaseAuthorization\GISVector MCGIS.sde\MCGIS.POI_Landmarks_New,NRNUM,-1,-1;TYPENAME2 "TYPENAME2" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,T:\GIS\GeodatabaseAuthorization\GISVector MCGIS.sde\MCGIS.POI_Landmarks_New,TYPENAME2,-1,-1;SHAPE_AREA "SHAPE_AREA" false false true 0 Double 0 0 ,First,#,T:\GIS\GeodatabaseAuthorization\GISVector MCGIS.sde\MCGIS.POI_Landmarks_New,SHAPE.AREA,-1,-1;SHAPE_LEN "SHAPE_LEN" false false true 0 Double 0 0 ,First,#,T:\GIS\GeodatabaseAuthorization\GISVector MCGIS.sde\MCGIS.POI_Landmarks_New,SHAPE.LEN,-1,-1" #

citRespParty.rpOrgName: Monroe County Department of Environmental Services

rpCntInfo.cntInstr: Contact the GIS Group with any questions pertaining to this data.

dataIdInfo.idPurp: The purpose of this layer is to define the areas of interest within Monroe County, New York. This layer is one of many layers used by the Monroe County Department of Environmental Services (DES).
dataIdInfo.idAbs: This is a vector polygon file that represents areas of interest in Monroe County, New York. Areas of interest in Monroe County are any space that the public would be inclined to visit, or any place that might somehow impact the lives of the local population, including (but not limited to) golf courses, shopping malls, industrial parks, cemeteries, government buildings, etc. This is a polygon feature class that attempts to show the shape of each area. This layer is used by the Department of Environmental Services (DES) for many purposes, among them cartography and planning.
dataIdInfo.idCredit: This layer was created by the Monroe County Department of Environmental Services (DES). This layer was originally created in GIS in 2007 where the addresses of areas of interest from Monroe County were geocoded and then digitized into polygons. (2007, Monroe County Department of Environmental Services, Rochester, NY).

Consts.useLimit:
Access Constraint: Some data layers can be purchased on CD by written request from the Monroe County Department of Environmental Services (Per Kristina Daugherty, GIS Analyst, October 3, 2011).
Use Constraint: The information contained herein is provided for informational purposes only. Use of this information is for the primary viewer or purchaser and is not intended for second party distribution. Monroe County, New York and their mapping and software consultants provide this GIS data and metadata with no claim as to the completeness, usefulness, or accuracy of its content, positional or otherwise. Your use and browsing of information is at your own risk. In providing this data and application or access to it, Monroe County, New York assumes no obligation to assist the user in the use of such data or in the development, use, or maintenance of any applications applied to or associated with the data or metadata (Per Kristina Daugherty, GIS Analyst, October 3, 2011).

idPoC.rpOrgName: Monroe County Department of Environmental Services

rpCntInfo.cntInstr: Contact the GIS Group with any questions pertaining to this data. The GIS Group maintains this dataset daily along with other Department of Environmental Services staff.

resMaint.maintNote: This layer is continually updated and modified as needed. Areas of Interest (AOI's) are created/deleted/modified as new AOI's are constructed/demolished/modified. Both spatial and attribute updates are made to this data.

maintCont.rpOrgName: Monroe County Department of Environmental Services

rpCntInfo.cntInstr: The GIS Group maintains this dataset along with other Department of Environmental Services staff.

distorCont.rpOrgName: Monroe County Department of Environmental Services

rpCntInfo.cntInstr: Data can be purchased on CD by written request from Monroe County Department of Environmental Services (Data Owner).

distorOrdPrc.ordInstr: Data can be purchased on CD by written request from Monroe County Department of Environmental Services (Data Owner); Technical Prerequisites: GIS/CAD software that is compatible with ESRI data formats is required to use this data.

enttyp.enttypds: Monroe County Department of Environmental Services

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: The street number and name for the mailing address of the area of interest.
attr.attrdefs: Monroe County Department of Environmental Services

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

scpLvlDesc.attribSet: Attributes are continually checked and updated as needed.

dataLineage.statement: This layer was created by the Monroe County Department of Environmental Services (DES). This layer was originally created in GIS in 2007 where the addresses of areas of interest from Monroe County were geocoded and then digitized into polygons. The data is currently stored and maintained in an ArcSDE geodatabase.

prcStep.stepDesc: Currently, the data is maintained and updated by geocoding addresses, and then digitizing features based on aerial photography. Standard ArcGIS editing functionality is used to maintain this data.
